# OPSQAI

> OPSQAI is an Enterprise Operational AI Platform delivered as a Windows Self-Hosted product. The Windows installation is the product; OPSQAI Cloud (Management Center and Customer Portal) exists only for licensing, releases, installer distribution and customer support. Customers own their data, documents, embeddings and AI provider.

## Product architecture

- Management Center (cloud, OPSQAI staff only): companies, installations, licenses, releases, signing keys, activation bundles, ownership, support, audit.
- Customer Portal (cloud, customer contacts): installer downloads, updates, activation bundles, documentation, release notes, subscription and support.
- Self-Hosted (Windows, the actual product): AI Chat, Knowledge Base, FAQ, Academy, AI Audit, Users, Organization, Subscription, Updates, Modules.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Positioning, architecture, modules, differentiation.
- [Product](/product): One product, three surfaces.
- [Modules](/modules): Basic Platform and Premium Modules.
- [Self-hosted](/self-hosted): Windows deployment, data flow, requirements.
- [Security](/security): Ed25519 licenses, hash-chained audit, CRL, chunk-level ACL.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Basic Platform, Premium Modules, Annual Maintenance.
- [Company](/company): Mission, team, go-to-market.
- [Contact](/contact): Request pricing, demo or installer.
